body:
Our bedroom got a huge refresh this spring, and I am loving it so much! Both the rug in the bed are both from @castleryus 🤍 The bed is called the Dalton storage bed in the color “beach linen”. And the rug is a 9 x 12 Cora Wool rug in the color “clay”. We do not have a ton of storage in this house, not even a linen closet, so adding a bed that had storage was a dream come true. Castlery was kind enough to give me a code! EMH80 to get an additional $80 off $1,500. Voucher Code is stackable with all existing promotions on site. 🙌🏼

Comment the word link and I will send you the link to both the bed and the rug! 

#AtHomeWithCastlery #homedecorideas #homedecor #primarybedroom #homedecortips #homemakeover

body:
Dining Room Tour! My parents’ home was destroyed in #stormdebby2024. They lost almost everything. So I was thrilled to partner with @castleryus to give them New Dining Room furniture for their ‘new to them’ home! (Which is beautiful). 
  This is the Vincent Oak Table in the 86’ in length, paired with the Edith cane dining chair. They also chose the Edith counter stools to put at the island! 
 @castleryus is a wonderful place to shop for modern, timeless furniture!
.
.
#castlery #castleryus #ad #homedesign #coastalmodern #diningroomtour @virginia_troyer

body:
When we found out we were becoming parents, we knew we needed a sofa that could grow with us.
Our old velvet couch just wasn’t
practical for life with a newborn. The @castleryus Jonathan Leather L-Shape Sectional Sofa is made with high-quality top-grain American leather — it’s durable, easy to clean, and cozy enough for all the cuddles, feedings, and family moments to come. #Ad #AtHomeWithCastlery

Voucher Code: CICHRYSTA80
Validity: Oct 22 - Dec 31 2025
 Get an additional $80 off $1,500. This voucher code is stackable with all other promotions on site.

body: I’m thrilled to help my best friend Marc, who I’ve known since our UC Santa Cruz printmaking days, celebrate his new Upstate New York home! I gave him the ultimate housewarming gift—a Dabify outdoor refresh, all thanks to @CastleryUS! His modern home with its black backdrop was perfect for clean lines and warm wicker. We transformed three spaces: the enclosed patio with the modular Rio outdoor sofa for cozy naps, a landing spot with Lorna swivel chairs for morning coffee, and the backyard with the stunning Sorrento dining table amidst lush trees for alfresco dining. Working with Castlery was a dream. Their customer service is truly unmatched. Go check them out and get your outdoor spaces summer-ready!

body:
bedroom is completely furnished thanks to @castleryus!

These Crescent 2-Drawer Nightstands are the most recent addition and we are smitten with them! They have a gorgeous burl finishing, curved edges and offer two drawers of storage under an open storage shelf.

They pair beautifully with the subtle curves of the wingback headboard on the Dalton bed from @castleryus.  We finished off the space with the Serena Floor Mirror (the wavy silhouette is so charming!) and an Amber Swivel Chair in Performance Smoke Gray fabric. 

#AtHomeWithCastlery #homedecorideas #homedecortips #homemakeover #upholsteredbed #primarybedroom

body:
I have been on the hunt for a new couch for over a year now, and I finally found the PERFECT one! This is the Johnathan Extended Side Chaise Sectional Sofa, in Performance Creamy White. It is modular so it’s super easy to move around and reconfigure in whatever space you have. The quality is incredible, and the delivery/assembly process was seamless and so easy! 

If you are on the hunt for a new couch, or any home furnishing needs, I can’t recommend @castleryus enough, their stuff is so cute!

#AtHomeWithCastlery #homedecorideas #homedecortips #homemakeover

body:
We completely transformed our dining room with @castleryus, and it has truly become one of the warmest, most inviting spaces in our home. From the timeless Seb dining table to the beautiful pop of character the Ashen sideboard brings, every piece feels intentional, elevated, and made for real life.🤍

This is the space where we host, break bread, and slow down together…and I couldn’t love it more.

And just a little heads up 👀 Castlery’s President’s Day Sale is coming up, making it the perfect time to invest in pieces that turn a house into a home. Plus you can use my code CCMAYAGRAVES to get an additional $80 off $1,500. This voucher code is stackable with all other promotions on site!🏡

Comment “links” for the 🔗to my furniture! 

.
.

body: I’m thrilled to help my best friend Marc, who I’ve known since our UC Santa Cruz printmaking days, celebrate his new Upstate New York home! I gave him the ultimate housewarming gift—a Dabify outdoor refresh, all thanks to @CastleryUS! His modern home with its black backdrop was perfect for clean lines and warm wicker. We transformed three spaces: the enclosed patio with the modular Rio outdoor sofa for cozy naps, a landing spot with Lorna swivel chairs for morning coffee, and the backyard with the stunning Sorrento dining table amidst lush trees for alfresco dining. Working with Castlery was a dream. Their customer service is truly unmatched. Go check them out and get your outdoor spaces summer-ready!

body: I’m thrilled to help my best friend Marc, who I’ve known since our UC Santa Cruz printmaking days, celebrate his new Upstate New York home! I gave him the ultimate housewarming gift—a Dabify outdoor refresh, all thanks to @CastleryUS! His modern home with its black backdrop was perfect for clean lines and warm wicker. We transformed three spaces: the enclosed patio with the modular Rio outdoor sofa for cozy naps, a landing spot with Lorna swivel chairs for morning coffee, and the backyard with the stunning Sorrento dining table amidst lush trees for alfresco dining. Working with Castlery was a dream. Their customer service is truly unmatched. Go check them out and get your outdoor spaces summer-ready!

body:
my LA home is finally starting to feel just right… 🥹 and when the furniture is this good, you owe it some nice styling and a great corner!

and for those of you wondering, here are the pieces featured:

- Seb Bookshelf, Large
- Mori Performance Fabric Armchair
- Mori C-Side Table
- Gaius Area Rug
- Mori Performance Fabric Ottoman

all from @castleryus! 

today (July 31) is the last day to use my codе PASHA80 for extra sаvings - it’s stackable with other promоs and valid on everything sitewide.

thank you for watching and have a great day! 😘🫶

#newapartment #vlog #la #losangeles #lifestyle #lainfluencer #californiainfluencer #lacontentcreator #furniture #apartment #home #closet #inspiration #motivation #dreamhome
